targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  mission.code AS "Mission",
  product_class.product_type AS "Product Type",
  product_file_name AS "Product File Name",
  file_size AS "File Size",

  CASE
    WHEN production_type = 'SYSTEMATIC' THEN 'Systematic Production'
    WHEN production_type = 'ON_DEMAND_DEFAULT' THEN 'On-Demand Default'
    WHEN production_type = 'ON_DEMAND_NON_DEFAULT' THEN 'On-Demand Non-Default'
    ELSE production_type
  END AS "Production Type",

  sensing_start_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "Sensing Start Time",
  sensing_stop_time  AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "Sensing Stop Time",
  raw_data_availability_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "Raw Data Availability Time",
  generation_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "Generation Time",
  publication_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "Publication Time",

  CASE
    WHEN raw_data_availability_time IS NULL
      THEN publication_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' - sensing_stop_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
    ELSE publication_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' - raw_data_availability_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
  END AS "Production Latency",

  publication_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' - sensing_stop_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AS "Total Latency"

FROM product
LEFT JOIN product_file ON product.id = product_file.product_id
INNER JOIN product_class ON product_class.id = product.product_class_id
INNER JOIN mission ON mission.id = product_class.mission_id
  AND product_class.processing_level IS NOT NULL

WHERE
  production_type IN (${var_production_type})
  AND $__timeFilter(publication_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')

ORDER BY publication_time AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'

list.name: var_production_type
list.label: Production Types
list.query: Systematic Production : SYSTEMATIC, On-Demand Default : ON_DEMAND_DEFAULT, On-Demand Non-Default : ON_DEMAND_NON_DEFAULT
